calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: modulatory-bias-selection-authority CONVERSION readiness: does the routed channel range MOVE the committed argmax under gain/contrast (std basis) + shortlist-then-modulate, beating a verified-lifting matched-noise control? (behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A; gates V3-EXQ-569h)
items.note: CLAIM-FREE substrate-readiness diagnostic (claim_ids=[]) for the modulatory-bias-selection-authority CONVERSION amend landed 2026-06-15 (e3_selector.py + config.py: gain/contrast modulatory_authority_normalize_basis range|std + use_modulatory_shortlist_then_modulate), routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569g_2026-06-14 + behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A governance_2026_06_15 after V3-EXQ-682 LANDED PASS 2026-06-15 (no_collapse_reproduced -- REACH solved, all 4 collapse causes ruled out incl seed 43; residual is CONVERSION). 6-arm grid x 3 seeds on the SAME stack as V3-EXQ-569g (SP-CEM + lateral_pfc + mech295 + SD-056 online contrastive + rollout-norm clamp + route-range source=cand_world_summary): ARM_PROPOSER (collapsed reference) / ARM_MATCHED_NOISE (proposer T=2.5, the entropy control) / ARM_LEGACY_E2WF (e2wf additive range g0.5 = 569g ARM_1, the no-conversion bar) / ARM_STD_G1 (e2wf std basis g1.0) / ARM_STD_G2 (e2wf std basis g2.0) / ARM_SHORTLIST (e2wf shortlist margin 0.25). PRIMARY DV: committed first-action-class entropy. Pre-registered, each self-routing substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a verdict): READINESS-1 (route-range, the V3-EXQ-662 statistic) e2wf arms apply in-arm modulatory_channel_route_range>0.01 on >=2/3 seeds; READINESS (e2 divergence) cand_world_pairwise_dist>0.03; READINESS-2 (the 569g gap) the matched-noise control VERIFY-LIFTS over ARM_PROPOSER on >=2/3 seeds (569g's control under-lifted to entropy==proposer -> vacuous bar). C_CONVERSION (load-bearing): >=1 conversion arm (STD_G1/STD_G2/SHORTLIST) committed entropy STRICTLY ABOVE BOTH ARM_LEGACY_E2WF AND ARM_MATCHED_NOISE on >=2/3 seeds. Self-route grid: readiness unmet -> substrate_not_ready_requeue (non_contributory); readiness + >=1 conversion arm lifts -> PASS (conversion_mechanism_identified; winning arm config selects V3-EXQ-569h); readiness + NO conversion arm lifts -> conversion_ceiling_persists_under_levers (FAIL; /failure-autopsy, do NOT auto-promote 569h). claim_ids=[] -> cannot weaken ARC-065/MECH-341/ARC-062/MECH-309/MECH-294. Smoke: validate_experiments --strict OK (arm-fingerprint enforced); --dry-run end-to-end all 6 arms (substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design, sentinel written). GATES the GAP-A falsifier V3-EXQ-569h (NOT yet queued; gated on this PASS). Do NOT start the runner (cloud workers auto-claim; prefer cloud).

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062): committed-class entropy on the 666c-validated crf-availability-maintenance substrate (supersedes V3-EXQ-654b)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B committed-class entropy behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062), supersedes V3-EXQ-654b. Port of the 654b single-variable ARM_OFF vs ARM_ON falsifier onto the NOW-VALIDATED crf-availability-maintenance substrate: V3-EXQ-666c PASSed 2026-06-15 (ARM_2 mean_frac_maintained 0.854 > 0.625 floor, all 4 readiness preconditions met) and flipped substrate_queue crf-availability-maintenance ready=True (REE_assembly origin/master be7261d9ca). 654/654a/654b ALL FAILed non_contributory / substrate_not_ready_requeue for the SAME reason: the C1c readiness floor crf_frac_active>=0.30 was never met (654b measured 0.130) because the CandidateRuleField pool churned (mint->retire->re-mint) and never HELD >=2 differentiated rules active, so the committed-class falsifier DV never scored. 654c arms ARM_ON with the 666c ARM_2 levers crf_mature_pool_dynamics + crf_context_from_e2_world_forward + crf_availability_maintenance (floor 0.45 / decay 0.0) on top of crf_persist, at an ENLARGED P0 maturation window 200 ep (was 150; matches the 666c budget that formed full-pool differentiation PRE-gap on all 3 seeds), with the frozen-encoder P1 trained-bias-head REINFORCE phase (GAP-D leg). PRIMARY DV = committed-class entropy. Pre-registered non-vacuity preconditions, each self-routing substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens): (i) C1c crf_frac_active>=0.30 actually clears now; (ii) propagation non-vacuity -- ARM_ON committed lateral_pfc bias differs from ARM_OFF (the bias reaches committed action). claim_ids=[MECH-309, ARC-062]: ONLY the PASS branch (C2 committed-class entropy lift on >=2/3 seeds) weights them, as supports. OFF-RAMP (pre-registered, NO weakens branch): if the matured+maintained+differentiated pool clears C1c AND the bias reaches committed action (C1d) but STILL fails to lift committed-class entropy, that is the SHARED selection-authority CONVERSION ceiling (behavioral_diversity_isolation:GAP-A; failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-569g_2026-06-14 + V3-EXQ-682: route-range reaches the E3 accumulator but does not move the F-dominated committed argmax), self-routes non_contributory + route /implement-substrate (same gain/contrast amend as GAP-A) -- NOT a MECH-309/ARC-062 falsification. C1-fail self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue. Smoke: validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end both arms (substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design, sentinel written). experiment_purpose=evidence.
